seo.title: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC Annotation Out-Of-Bounds Read Information Disclosure Vulnerability - HackSys Inc
seo.description: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC has an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the handling of Annotation objects, allowing remote attackers to disclose sensitive information. User interaction, like visiting a malicious page or opening a malicious file, is needed for exploitation. This flaw can be combined with other vulnerabilities for arbitrary code execution. (CVE-2022-28249)

frontmatter.title: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC Annotation Out-Of-Bounds Read Information Disclosure Vulnerability
frontmatter.excerpt: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC has an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the handling of Annotation objects, allowing remote attackers to disclose sensitive information. User interaction, like visiting a malicious page or opening a malicious file, is needed for exploitation. This flaw can be combined with other vulnerabilities for arbitrary code execution. pageProps.content:
## Vulnerability

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC Annotation Out-Of-Bounds Read Information Disclosure Vulnerability

## Vulnerability Description

This vulnerability allows remote attackers to disclose sensitive information on affected installations of Adobe Acrobat Reader DC. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file.

The specific flaw exists within the handling of Annotation objects. By performing actions in JavaScript, an attacker can trigger a read past the end of an allocated object. An attacker can leverage this in conjunction with other vulnerabilities to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process.

## CVE ID

CVE-2022-28249

## Vendor

[Adobe](https://www.adobe.com/)

## Products

- Acrobat Reader DC - 2021.011.20039 and earlier

## Disclosure Timeline

- 21 February 2022 - Vulnerability reported to ZDI
- 12 April 2022 - Coordinated public release of advisory

## Credits

Krishnakant Patil and Ashfaq Ansari - HackSys Inc

## ZDI Advisory

<https://www.zerodayinitiative.com/advisories/ZDI-22-645/>

## Vendor Advisory

<https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/acrobat/apsb22-16.html>
